seoTitle: Leighton vs Lewiston — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Leighton and Lewiston. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Leighton and Lewiston.
heading: Leighton vs Lewiston — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Leighton, South Australia and Lewiston, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lewiston has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Leighton (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Leighton or Lewiston safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Leighton has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Lewiston scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Leighton scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Lewiston scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Leighton or Lewiston?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lewiston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
